lucids.name: Flickerfly
lucids.description: It carries a small flame on its back that's hot to the touch and lights up the night sky.

lucids.name: Knightilite
lucids.description: The light from its shield indicates Knightilite's life force. If it is healthy, the light glows vibrantly.

lucids.name: Sirlampsalot
lucids.description: The bubbles contained in both ends of its lance can reach up to 1,000 degrees Fahrenheit.

lucids.name: Poppup
lucids.description: It requires a lot of energy for Poppup to stand on its own. It sometimes falls over if it gets too drowsy.

lucids.name: Capyblo
lucids.description: If defeated in battle, only then does the bubble blown from its nose burst. This Lucid always appears to be in a state of hibernation.

lucids.name: Bubbelara
lucids.description: Bubbelara controls the bubbles that surround it purely with its mind. There is no purpose for it to move its own body.

lucids.name: Coocoo
lucids.description: Despite its appearance, Coocoo is entirely made of wood. Each of its feathers is thinner than paper.

lucids.name: Perchipek
lucids.description: The hourglass it grips onto is filled with sawdust. If some of it trickles out, Perchipek whittles away at its fallen feathers to refill it.

lucids.name: Tikitoki
lucids.description: Tikitoki's talons are strong enough to carry its clock with ease through the sky. Despite the clock's intricate appearance, it's only right twice a day.

lucids.name: Fleezy
lucids.description: Fleezy often help clean each other to keep their wool super soft. Any Lucid that stays in contact with its wool for too long falls fast asleep.

lucids.name: Woolawake
lucids.description: The nightcaps on its head hide powerful horns that can deal massive damage without fracturing.

lucids.name: Kreepi
lucids.description: A Lucid that was formed by the souls of those who dedicated their lives to computer programming. It takes a virtual form while bound to a computer.

lucids.name: Krawli
lucids.description: Each of its legs is comprised entirely of binary code. The 0's and 1's rapidly change as it moves.

lucids.name: Cawlow
lucids.description: Cawlow's wings are too small for it to fly. It relies on its large beak to scavenge for food on the ground.

lucids.name: Corviclipse
lucids.description: It can spread its wings up to 300 degrees, almost forming a perfect circle. It blocks out beams of light to hide in the shadows.

lucids.name: Lockdream
lucids.description: Originally created to trap humans in a state of REM sleep, Lockdream now operates of its own free will. It does not hold back in battle.
